Strategic Commercial Property Finance for Business Growth & Investment

Professional commercial property financing from $300K to $10M+ for business premises and investment properties. Specialised solutions for commercial trades, civil contractors, and property investors.

Commercial Property Finance Solutions

🏢

Business Premises Finance

Strategic financing for your business operations headquarters

  • Workshop and warehouse facilities
  • Office and administration buildings
  • Showroom and retail premises
  • Mixed-use commercial properties
  • Industrial and manufacturing sites
💼

Investment Property Finance

Build wealth through strategic commercial property investment

  • Office building investments
  • Industrial property portfolios
  • Retail and hospitality properties
  • Healthcare and professional suites
💼

Property Investment Finance

Strategic finance for commercial property investment and portfolio growth

  • Multi-property portfolio financing
  • Property refinancing and restructuring
  • Equity release for further investment
  • Commercial property upgrades
  • Strategic property acquisition
🔄

Refinancing Solutions

Optimize existing commercial property debt and unlock equity

  • Rate and term improvements
  • Cash-out refinancing
  • Debt consolidation strategies
  • Portfolio restructuring
  • Switch from bank alternatives

Commercial Property Finance Success Stories

The Expanding Civil Contractor

Challenge: Growing earthmoving business needed larger premises for equipment storage and maintenance facilities.

Solution: $1.2M commercial property loan for 2-hectare industrial site with workshop and office facilities.

✓ 60% increase in operational efficiency and 40% business growth in first year

The Strategic Property Investor

Challenge: Commercial electrical contractor wanted to diversify income through property investment.

Solution: Investment property portfolio financing for three industrial properties leased to similar trades.

✓ $180K annual passive income stream established with strong capital growth

The Portfolio Expansion

Challenge: HVAC contractor wanted to expand their commercial property portfolio for long-term wealth creation.

Solution: Strategic refinancing of existing properties to acquire additional commercial investments.

✓ Portfolio value increased to $3.2M with strong rental yields and capital growth

Commercial Property Finance Products

Standard Commercial Loan

LVR: Up to 80%

Terms: 5-30 years

Rates: From 4.5% p.a.

Amount: $300K - $10M+

Key Features:

  • Principal & Interest or Interest Only
  • Fixed or variable rate options
  • Minimal ongoing fees
  • Early repayment flexibility
Best For: Established businesses purchasing owner-occupied or investment properties

Low Doc Commercial Loan

LVR: Up to 70%

Terms: 5-25 years

Rates: From 5.2% p.a.

Amount: $250K - $5M

Key Features:

  • Simplified documentation requirements
  • Self-employed income verification
  • Fast approval process
  • Asset-based lending focus
Best For: Self-employed trades and contractors with strong asset position

Investment Property Finance

LVR: Up to 80%

Terms: 15-30 years

Rates: From 5.8% p.a.

Amount: $400K - $15M+

Key Features:

  • Portfolio financing options
  • Cross-collateralisation strategies
  • Tax optimisation structuring
  • Equity release capabilities
Best For: Commercial property investment and wealth building

Professional Property Finance Process

1

Property Strategy Assessment

Comprehensive review of your property objectives, business needs, cash flow capacity, and investment strategy alignment.

2

Property & Market Analysis

Professional property valuation, market analysis, rental yield assessment, and due diligence coordination.

3

Finance Structuring

Strategic loan structuring to optimize tax benefits, cash flow, and long-term investment returns while minimizing risk.

4

Lender Negotiation & Settlement

Professional negotiation with commercial property lenders, management of all documentation, and seamless settlement process.

Why Choose EVFBS for Commercial Property Finance

Property Investment Expertise

Deep understanding of commercial property markets, investment strategies, and the specific needs of trades and contractors in property investment.

Industry-Specific Knowledge

Specialized knowledge of industrial, workshop, and trade-specific property requirements including zoning, access, and operational considerations.

Competitive Rates & Terms

Access to wholesale commercial property rates and flexible terms through our established relationships with specialised commercial lenders.

Tax Optimization Strategies

Strategic structuring to maximize depreciation benefits, negative gearing advantages, and capital gains tax optimisation opportunities.

Portfolio Growth Planning

Long-term strategic planning for property portfolio growth, including equity utilisation and systematic expansion strategies.

Professional Project Management

Comprehensive management of the entire finance process from application through settlement, ensuring smooth and timely completion.

Specialized Property Types We Finance

Industrial & Warehouse

Purpose-built facilities for manufacturing, distribution, and heavy trade operations with specialised infrastructure requirements.

Workshop & Trade Facilities

Specialized workshop spaces for electrical, plumbing, HVAC, and mechanical trade businesses with equipment and vehicle storage.

Office & Commercial

Professional office buildings, commercial complexes, and mixed-use properties generating stable rental income streams.

Mixed-Use Properties

Commercial properties with multiple income streams including retail, office, and industrial components for diversified returns.

Retail & Hospitality

Retail premises, restaurants, hotels, and hospitality properties with strong tenant covenants and cash flow generation.

Specialized Commercial

Healthcare facilities, educational properties, and specialized commercial buildings with unique operational requirements.

Ready to Secure Your Commercial Property Investment?

Join successful commercial trades and property investors who've built substantial wealth through strategic commercial property finance with our professional guidance.
